documentation.text:
@title ERC20 Vote Procedure.
 @notice An ERC20 Vote Procedure will execute operations based on the decision of a vote. The voter's relative weight in the vote depends on the amount of tokens they own of a certain asset.
@notice tokenContract is an ERC20 token contract representing the rights to vote.

@notice quorumSize is the minimum percentage of votes required to validate a election.
 @dev Minimum value (1) is 0.0001% (1/1000000) of all the votes cast.

@notice majoritySize is the minimum percentage of votes required to validate a election.
 @dev Minimum value (1) is 0.0001% (1/1000000) of all addresses allowed to vote.
@notice Check that initialize parameters are correct.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory,struct ProcedureLibrary.Operation memory[] memory) returns (uint256)

Initialized(uint8).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

adoptProposal(uint256).details: Overrides ProcedureLibrary.adoptProposal. Having count here snapshots the votes. If a high gas price transaction transfers a lot of tokens, and then calls adoptProposal, the result of the vote could be determined by the highest bidder.

params.proposalKey: The key of the proposal to adopt.
The key of the proposal to block.
params.reason: The IPFS multihash of the document explaining why the proposal has been blocked.

params.proposalKey: The key used to identify the proposal.

returns.approved: True if the election has been approved.

params._proposalKey: The key used to identify the proposal.

returns.hasVoted: True if the sender has voted.
returns.votesCount: Number of votes cast so far.

returns.forwarder: The address of the Forwarder contract that is being used.

params._deciders: The organ whose entries will be allowed to adopt or refect proposals.
params._majoritySize: The minimum percentage of votes required to validate a election.
params._moderators: The organ whose entries will be allowed to moderate proposals.
params._proposers: The organ whose entries will be allowed to propose proposals.
params._quorumSize: The minimum percentage of votes required to validate a election.
params._tokenContract: The ERC20 token contract representing the rights to vote.
params._withModeration: Whether or not the procedure requires moderation.

params.forwarder: The address of the Forwarder contract that is being used.

returns._0: isTrustedForwarder `true` if the Forwarder is trusted to forward relayed transactions by this Recipient.

params.proposalKey: The key of the proposal to present.

params._metadata: IPFS multihash of the proposal metadata.
params._operations: Array of operations to execute if the proposal is approved.

returns._0: isSupported True if the interface is supported, false otherwise.

params.approval: True if the voter approves the proposal, false otherwise.
params.proposalKey: The key used to identify the proposal.

majoritySize.details: Minimum value (1) is 0.0001% (1/1000000) of all addresses allowed to vote.

quorumSize.details: Minimum value (1) is 0.0001% (1/1000000) of all the votes cast.

blockProposal(uint256,string).notice: A veto accepts arguments which defines a motivation as a IPFS multihash.

count(uint256).notice: Count votes after election has ended.

getTrustedForwarder().notice: :warning: **Warning** :warning: The Forwarder can have a full control over your Recipient. Only trust verified Forwarder.Method is not a required method to allow Recipients to trust multiple Forwarders. Not recommended yet.

initialize(string,address,address,addres.notice: Check that initialize parameters are correct.

isTrustedForwarder(address).notice: :warning: **Warning** :warning: The Forwarder can have a full control over your Recipient. Only trust verified Forwarder.

majoritySize().notice: majoritySize is the minimum percentage of votes required to validate a election.

quorumSize().notice: quorumSize is the minimum percentage of votes required to validate a election.

rejectProposal(uint256).notice: The procedure calls this method directly to adopt and apply proposal.

tokenContract().notice: tokenContract is an ERC20 token contract representing the rights to vote.

updateCid(string).notice: Public API : Procedure Cid and Admin.

userdoc.notice: An ERC20 Vote Procedure will execute operations based on the decision of a vote. The voter's relative weight in the vote depends on the amount of tokens they own of a certain asset.
